const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help; rg -n 'salience|fee|response_requested|originating_court' metrics/statpack.json | sed -n '1,160p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"fee_class\")) | select(.term == \"2025\" or .term == 2025)' metrics/statpack.json | sed -n '1,240p'; jq '.. | objects | select(.originating_court? == \"Supreme Court of Minnesota\")' metrics/statpack.json | sed -n '1,180p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '.terms' metrics/statpack.json | sed -n '1,320p'; jq '.sections[] | {title, group_by, rows: [.rows[]? | select(.bucket == \"Supreme Court of Minnesota\" or .originating_court == \"Supreme Court of Minnesota\")]} | select(.rows|length>0)' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);
